acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Zooza AI is available at no extra cost for all active Zooza customers. You only need a Claude account — claude.ai has a free tier.

mainEntity.name: Is it secure? Where does my data go?

acceptedAnswer.text: Zooza AI does not store your login credentials. Authentication happens via OAuth — the same system as signing in to zooza.app. Claude only sees data that Zooza provides during your conversation.

mainEntity.name: We have a franchise with multiple locations. Does Zooza AI support that?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. If your account has access to multiple companies, Claude will list them and ask which one you want to work with. You can switch between companies within the same conversation.

mainEntity.name: Which AI model should I use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Zooza AI works with multiple Claude models. You can compare their accuracy, speed, and cost in Settings → Zooza AI → Model performance. The comparison is updated periodically based on real usage. Use it to choose the model that best fits your priorities.

mainEntity.name: The connection is not working. What should I do?

acceptedAnswer.text:
1. Confirm that you have an active Zooza account with Admin access.
2. Try signing out and back in via OAuth.
3. If the problem persists, contact support@zooza.online.
